infores:clingen.name: ClinGen - Variant Pathogenicity
infores:clingen.description: ClinGen variant curation utilizes the 2015 American College of Medical Genetics and Genomics (ACMG) guideline for sequence variant interpretation, which provides an evidence-based framework to classify variants. The results of these analyses will be deposited in ClinVar for community access.
infores:clingen.fullCitation: Rehm HL, Berg JS, Brooks LD, Bustamante CD, Evans JP, Landrum MJ, Ledbetter DH, Maglott DR, Martin CL, Nussbaum RL, Plon SE, Ramos EM, Sherry ST, Watson MS; ClinGen. ClinGen--the Clinical Genome Resource. N Engl J Med. 2015 Jun 4;372(23):2235-42. doi: 10.1056/NEJMsr1406261.
